quotes.text: You are a success going somewhere to happen.
quotes.author: Pastor Chris Oyakhilome

quotes.text: The Word of God is your sure foundation.
quotes.author: Pastor Chris Oyakhilome

quotes.text: You are the light of the world.
quotes.author: Pastor Chris Oyakhilome

quotes.text: Grace gives you boldness to live beyond fear.
Hope is strongest when your focus stays on Christ.

affirmations.text: I am blessed and highly favored.
I walk in divine health and prosperity.
I am a light to my world.
I have wisdom for every decision before me today.
My heart is anchored in peace, not pressure.

scriptures.text: I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me.
The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.
For God so loved the world that He gave His only begotten Son.
Trust in the Lord with all thine heart; and lean not unto thine own understanding.
Be strong and of a good courage; be not afraid, neither be thou dismayed: for the Lord thy God is with thee whithersoever thou goest.
